title: Microsoft rolls out revamped Windows Insider Program
description: Microsoft says it's rolling out a revamped Windows Insider Program experience as part of the broader plans to address performance and reliability concerns affecting Windows 11. [...]
author: Mayank Parmar

title: Threat actor uses Microsoft Teams to deploy new “Snow” malware
description: A threat group tracked as UNC6692 uses social engineering to deploy a new, custom malware suite named 'Snow' which includes a browser extension, a tunneler, and a backdoor. [...]
author: Bill Toulas
